title: ERROR: Multiple edge sensitive events found for this signal!

features.name: always_ff with async reset and self-referencing condition
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with edge-sensitive event control (posedge clk or posedge rstTrigger) where a signal assigned within the block is also used as a condition in an else-if branch within the same block

features.name: sv2v converted always_ff to always procedural block
features.description: Code should include a signal assigned in an always block with edge-sensitive event control that is also used in a combinational condition within the same block, producing conflicting edge sensitivity
